name: Hamarikyu Gardens — Nakajima-no-Ochaya
editor_note: This is a café, not a ceremony — which makes it perfect if a full tea ceremony feels like more commitment than you want.
notes: Matcha and wagashi in a garden teahouse; entry-level 'tea moment' rather than a ceremony.
price_note: Matcha + seasonal wagashi set 850 yen, plus garden entry 300 yen. Verify current status before publishing.
